filters: CVG.COVERAGE_TYPE_C = 2 /* Managed Care */ AND COVERAGE_MEMBER_LIST(CVGEPT).MEM_COVERED_YN = 'Y' AND COVERAGE_MEMBER_LIST(CVGEPT).MEM_EFF_FROM_DATE <= GETDATE() AND (COVERAGE_MEMBER_LIST(CVGEPT).MEM_EFF_TO_DATE >= GETDATE() OR COVERAGE_MEMBER_LIST(CVGEPT).MEM_EFF_TO_DATE IS NULL)
PLAN_GRP_BEN_PLAN(PGEPP).BEN_PLAN_EFF_DATE <= GETDATE() AND (PLAN_GRP_BEN_PLAN(PGEPP).BEN_PLAN_TERM_DT >= GETDATE() OR PLAN_GRP_BEN_PLAN(PGEPP).BEN_PLAN_TERM_DT IS NULL)

CVG_LOC_PCP(CVGLOCSER).EFF_DATE <= GETDATE() AND (CVG_LOC_PCP(CVGLOCSER).TERM_DATE >= GETDATE() OR CVG_LOC_PCP(CVGLOCSER).TERM_DATE IS NULL) AND (CVG_LOC_PCP(CVGLOCSER).DELETED_FLAG_YN = 'N' OR CVG_LOC_PCP(CVGLOCSER).DELETED_FLAG_YN IS NULL)
